description: A DNS record maps a domain name to resource information within a VPC.

CreatedAt.description: Creation time of the DNS record.

Enable.description: Indicates whether the DNS record is enabled.

LastOperator.description: Account ID of the most recent update to the DNS record.

Line.description: DNS record route, only the default route 'default' is supported.

Remark.description: Remarks. Supports UTF-8 characters. Maximum 16 characters. Default is an empty string.

TTL.description: DNS record TTL (time to live), in seconds. Default is 600.

Type.description: DNS record type. Valid values are: A: A record. AAAA: AAAA record. CNAME: CNAME record. TXT: TXT record. MX: MX record. PTR: PTR record. A: A record. AAAA: AAAA record. CNAME: CNAME record. TXT: TXT record. MX: MX record. PTR: PTR record.

UpdatedAt.description: Last update time of the DNS record.

Weight.description: Record weight. The weight takes effect only when load balancing is enabled for the domain name.

WeightEnabled.description: Indicates whether load balancing is enabled for this record set.
